subcodes.first_line: The Wronged One hath heard thy testimony and beholdeth thee in thy state. He, verily, is the All-Hearing, the All-Seeing. Blessed art thou inasmuch as [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد سمع المظلوم شهادتک و یراک فیما انت علیه انه لهو السمیع البصیر طوبی لک بما
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @prayer for protection
